title: Implement user ID-based admin authentication system

requirements.text: Replace principal-based admin authentication with a user ID system in backend/main.mo that stores and checks admin user IDs instead of principals

quotes: Can you use user id for the admin panel so you can add me to use it please

acceptanceCriteria: Backend maintains a list of authorized admin user IDs
isCallerAdmin method checks caller's user ID against the admin list
User ID '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' is added to the admin list
Backend logging shows user ID comparisons during authentication

requirements.text: Create a backend method to add new admin user IDs that can only be called by existing admins

quotes: Can you use user id for the admin panel so you can add me to use it please

acceptanceCriteria: Method addAdmin(userId: Text) exists and is protected
Only existing admins can call addAdmin
New admin user IDs are persisted across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Update the backend to map Internet Identity principals to user IDs and use user IDs for all admin checks
acceptanceCriteria: Backend creates user IDs for authenticated principals
User ID generation is consistent for the same principal
isCallerAdmin uses the generated user ID for authorization checks
User ID mapping is logged for debugging

requirements.text: Initialize the backend admin system with user ID '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' as the first admin during canister initialization
acceptanceCriteria: User ID '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' is added to admin list on initialization
This user ID immediately has admin access after deployment
Admin list persists across canister upgrades

constraints: Maintain single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo
Preserve existing user profile and clip management functionality
Do not modify Internet Identity authentication flow
Ensure admin list persists across canister upgrades
nonGoals: Implementing role-based access control beyond admin/non-admin
Creating a UI for managing admin users in this build
